<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/dropdown/planningUnit/program/filter/multipleProgramAndTracerCategory"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of planning units filtered on a list of program IDs and tracer category

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}

  title={"Body"}

>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
